name: Chip Group
description: A grid-based layout for chips, typically used within Selection Cards.

guidelines.purpose: Chip Group provides a structured grid for chips in selection-heavy contexts. It adapts between 2-column (categories) and 4-column (granular options) layouts.

anatomy.container: cg. var(--size-list-card-width-md) width, var(--sizing-200) gap between items.
anatomy.row: cg__row. Horizontal flex container ensuring equal distribution of chips via flex:1.
anatomy.chip: cg__chip. var(--sizing-1000) height, var(--border-radius-full) radius, var(--border-width-100) border var(--color-gradient-border-secondary-stop-1).

states.selected: cg__chip--sel. 700 bold weight, bg var(--color-background-selection-secondary), border var(--color-gradient-content-stop-1), and var(--color-content-key) text color.
